news.title: Reliance Q2 FY26 PAT rises 9% on Jio, Retail strength
news.snippet: Reliance Industries reported a 9.4% year-on-year rise in consolidated net profit for Q2 FY26, driven by continued subscriber growth at Jio and improving footfall at Reliance Retail. The O2C segment remained under pressure due to weak global refining margins, but management guided for recovery in H2.

news.title: Jio crosses 500 million subscribers milestone
news.snippet: Jio Platforms announced it surpassed 500 million active subscribers, cementing its position as India's largest telecom operator by user base. Average revenue per user (ARPU) rose to Rs 195, up from Rs 181 a year ago, after the July 2025 tariff hike.

news.title: Reliance Retail posts record festive season sales
news.snippet: Reliance Retail reported its highest-ever quarterly gross revenue during the October-December festive quarter, with its fashion and lifestyle vertical growing 28% YoY. The company opened 210 new stores in the quarter, taking its total store count past 19,000.

news.title: TCS Q2 revenue growth slows to 4.1% amid client caution
news.snippet: TCS reported consolidated revenue of Rs 63,400 crore for Q2 FY26, a 4.1% year-on-year growth, below analyst estimates of 5.5%. Management attributed the slowdown to prolonged deal decision cycles among BFSI and retail clients in North America, while EBIT margin held steady at 24.1%.

news.title: TCS wins $1.2B deal with European insurance firm
news.snippet: Tata Consultancy Services announced a five-year managed services contract with a leading European insurer, valued at approximately $1.2 billion. The deal covers application modernisation, cloud migration, and AI-led operations, and is TCS's largest deal in the BFSI vertical in two years.

news.title: TCS lays off 2,000 employees in annual performance cycle
news.snippet: TCS confirmed the separation of approximately 2,000 employees as part of its annual performance-linked review, accounting for under 0.5% of its 620,000-strong workforce. The company maintained its full-year hiring guidance and said fresher onboarding remained on track for FY26.

news.title: HDFC Bank Q2 net interest margin compresses to 3.46%
news.snippet: HDFC Bank's net interest margin fell to 3.46% in Q2 FY26 from 3.65% a year ago, as the bank works through higher-cost deposits acquired post-merger with HDFC Ltd. Advances grew 9% YoY while deposits grew 15%, signalling the bank is actively managing its credit-deposit ratio.

news.title: RBI rate cut cycle expected to benefit HDFC Bank in H2 FY26
news.snippet: Following the RBI's 50bps cumulative rate cuts in 2025, analysts expect HDFC Bank to see NIM recovery as its floating-rate loan book reprices upward while deposit costs gradually moderate. The bank's CASA ratio of 38% provides a natural buffer against funding cost pressures.

news.title: HDFC Bank board approves Rs 7,000 Cr NCD issuance
news.snippet: HDFC Bank's board approved a Non-Convertible Debenture issuance of up to Rs 7,000 crore to diversify its funding mix and reduce dependence on bulk deposits. The NCDs carry a 7.45% coupon for a 3-year tenor and are expected to be listed on BSE.

news.title: Infosys raises FY26 revenue guidance to 4.5-5% in CC terms
news.snippet: Infosys upgraded its constant-currency revenue growth guidance for FY26 to 4.5-5%, up from the earlier 3.75-4.5%, after reporting a strong Q2 with deal wins of $2.4 billion TCV. The company cited acceleration in financial services and manufacturing verticals as key drivers.

news.title: Infosys launches Topaz AI suite for enterprise clients
news.snippet: Infosys unveiled Topaz 2.0, an expanded AI-first services platform targeting enterprise automation, with prebuilt agents for finance, HR, and supply chain. The company said early adopters from the retail and utilities sectors had achieved 30-40% cost reduction in pilot deployments.

news.title: ICICI Bank Q2 PAT jumps 14% to Rs 12,200 Cr
news.snippet: ICICI Bank reported net profit of Rs 12,200 crore for Q2 FY26, a 14.4% year-on-year increase, driven by healthy loan growth of 17% and stable asset quality. Gross NPA ratio improved to 1.97%, the lowest in over a decade, reinforcing the bank's credit underwriting reputation.

news.title: ICICI Bank expands co-lending partnerships with NBFCs
news.snippet: ICICI Bank signed co-lending agreements with four additional non-banking finance companies to expand its reach in the MSME and affordable housing segments. Co-originated loans now account for nearly 8% of the bank's retail book, up from 3% two years ago.

news.title: Airtel ARPU climbs to Rs 245 after July tariff hike flows in
news.snippet: Bharti Airtel reported ARPU of Rs 245 for Q2 FY26, a sharp jump from Rs 203 a year earlier, as the full effect of the July 2025 tariff revision flowed through. 5G subscriber base crossed 110 million, with management guiding that 5G ARPU is 20-25% higher than 4G on average.

news.title: Airtel Africa posts strong Q3 results despite forex headwinds
news.snippet: Airtel Africa reported constant-currency revenue growth of 11% for its December quarter, although reported revenue in USD was impacted by depreciation in the Nigerian naira and East African currencies. Management said the Nigeria business has stabilised following the currency rebase.

news.title: Tata Power solar EPC order book crosses Rs 22,000 Cr
news.snippet: Tata Power Renewable Energy announced its solar EPC and C&I business order book has crossed Rs 22,000 crore, with orders from government agencies, PSUs, and large industrial corporates. The company is targeting 20 GW of renewable capacity by 2030 and is on track to meet 8 GW by end-FY26.

news.title: Tata Power Mundra plant receives CERC approval for revised tariff
news.snippet: The Central Electricity Regulatory Commission approved a revised tariff for the Mundra ultra-mega power plant, ending years of uncertainty for Tata Power. The revised tariff covers higher coal import costs, potentially restoring the plant's contribution to group profitability.

financials.data_source: Zomato Q4 FY25 BSE filing (yfinance unavailable for this ticker)

news.title: Zomato Q2 PAT surges on Blinkit quick commerce profitability
news.snippet: Zomato reported consolidated net profit of Rs 940 crore for Q2 FY26, with Blinkit turning EBITDA-positive in three consecutive quarters. Quick commerce gross order value grew 90% YoY as Blinkit expanded dark store count to 1,400 across 60 cities.

news.title: Zomato to enter luxury food delivery segment with 'District'
news.snippet: Zomato announced the launch of District, a premium restaurant discovery and reservation platform targeting metro audiences. The platform will integrate with Zomato Gold and is expected to improve monetisation among high-value users in the top six cities.

news.title: L&T wins Rs 14,000 Cr Saudi Aramco pipeline project
news.snippet: Larsen and Toubro's Hydrocarbon division secured a major offshore pipeline and infrastructure contract from Saudi Aramco, valued at approximately Rs 14,000 crore. The project is expected to be executed over 36 months and significantly boosts the company's international order book.

news.title: L&T Q3 order inflows hit record Rs 1.1 lakh Cr
news.snippet: Larsen and Toubro reported quarterly order inflows of Rs 1,10,000 crore for Q3 FY26, the highest in its history, driven by domestic infrastructure awards and strong Middle East pipeline. The consolidated order book now stands at Rs 5.8 lakh crore, providing strong revenue visibility.

news.title: Dixon Technologies wins Apple display module supply deal
news.snippet: Dixon Technologies confirmed a new supply agreement to manufacture display modules for Apple products at its Noida facility, under the PLI scheme for electronics. The deal is expected to add Rs 3,000 crore to Dixon's annual revenue from FY27 onwards.

news.title: Dixon Q2 revenue jumps 131% on telecom and IT hardware PLI
news.snippet: Dixon Technologies reported Q2 FY26 revenue of Rs 10,900 crore, a 131% year-on-year increase, driven by ramp-up in mobile phone manufacturing and new IT hardware PLI production lines. Net profit grew 69% to Rs 218 crore despite margin compression from rapid scaling.
